patches.summary: Wrap bare NYPL API tokens in the required Authorization header format.
patches.reason: NYPL documents a non-standard Authorization value, Token token="..."; users should be able to pass the bare token via env or auth set-token.
patches.validated_outcome: go test ./..., go vet ./..., go build ./..., --help, which search, and dry-run search all pass.

patches.summary: Add a stories discover command that expands a seed character into NYPL-friendly story searches, narrative clusters, and similar characters.
patches.reason: Anne Boleyn research showed that agent users need higher-level story/archetype discovery rather than raw keyword search only.
patches.validated_outcome: go test ./..., go vet ./..., go build -o ./bin/nypl-digital-collections-pp-cli ./cmd/nypl-digital-collections-pp-cli, and stories discover Anne Boleyn --dry-run --json pass.

patches.summary: Allow generated collections_items and subcollections typed-table upserts to fall back from collections_id to parent_id.
patches.reason: Dependent sync paths annotate child rows with parent_id; the typed tables require collections_id, so fallback is needed to preserve parent relationships instead of dropping typed-table writes.

patches.summary: Add the first practical research workflow layer: run story plans, save workspace runs, rank/dedupe items, and emit story dossiers.
patches.reason: The raw API wrapper needs archive-native research workflows so agents can move from story discovery plans to repeatable evidence collection and dossier artifacts.
patches.validated_outcome: go test ./..., go vet ./..., go build ./..., rebuilt bin/nypl-digital-collections-pp-cli, and dry-run smoke tests for stories dossier/search run-plan/workspace pass.
